Title: Landing page loads successfully with all Oktawave branding elements
Preconditions: Server is running on port 9001, browser is open
Steps: 1. Navigate to http://localhost:9001 | 2. Wait for page to fully load | 3. Verify all sections are visible
Expected Result: Landing page displays with Oktawave logo, primary color #003366, secondary color #0066CC, accent color #FF6600, correct typography (Open Sans and Roboto fonts), hero section, features section, how-it-works section, FAQ section, and footer all visible

Title: User clicks ""Start Your Application"" button in hero section
Preconditions: Landing page is loaded, user is not authenticated
Steps: 1. Scroll to hero section | 2. Click "Start Your Application" button | 3. Observe the confirmation dialog
Expected Result: A confirmation dialog appears asking user to register or login, with options for both actions

Title: User navigates using header navigation links
Preconditions: Landing page is loaded
Steps: 1. Click on "Features" link in header | 2. Verify smooth scroll to features section | 3. Repeat for "How It Works" and "FAQ" links
Test Data: Navigation links: Features, How It Works, FAQ
Expected Result: Page smoothly scrolls to the corresponding section, section comes into viewport and receives focus

Title: FAQ accordion expands and collapses correctly
Preconditions: Landing page is loaded, FAQs are loaded from API
Steps: 1. Scroll to FAQ section | 2. Click on first FAQ question | 3. Verify answer expands | 4. Click again | 5. Verify answer collapses
Expected Result: FAQ answer expands smoothly showing full text when clicked, collapses when clicked again, aria-expanded attribute toggles correctly between true and false

Title: Complete user journey from landing page to loan application initiation
Preconditions: Server running, database connected, landing page accessible
Steps: 1. Open landing page at http://localhost:9001 | 2. Read hero section content | 3. Scroll through features section | 4. Review how-it-works steps | 5. Read FAQ section | 6. Click "Apply Now" button in CTA section | 7. Handle authentication prompt
Expected Result: User can view all landing page content, understand loan process, and initiate application flow by being redirected to registration/login

Title: API integration for FAQ content retrieval
Preconditions: Server running, /api/landing/content/faq endpoint available
Steps: 1. Open browser developer tools | 2. Navigate to landing page | 3. Check Network tab | 4. Verify GET request to /api/landing/content/faq | 5. Verify FAQ data is rendered
Expected Result: Successful API call returns FAQ data in JSON format, FAQ section renders with questions and answers from API, status code 200

Title: Landing page behavior when FAQ API endpoint fails
Preconditions: Server running but /api/landing/content/faq returns 404 or 500
Steps: 1. Navigate to landing page | 2. Observe FAQ section loading | 3. Verify fallback FAQs are displayed
Expected Result: Fallback FAQ content is displayed (3 default questions about approval process, required documents, and interest rates), no JavaScript errors in console, user experience is not broken

Title: Landing page responsive design on mobile devices
Preconditions: Landing page accessible, mobile device or browser in responsive mode
Steps: 1. Open landing page | 2. Set viewport to 375x667 (iPhone SE) | 3. Scroll through entire page | 4. Verify all elements are readable and accessible | 5. Test on 768x1024 (iPad) | 6. Test on 1920x1080 (Desktop)
Expected Result: All content is readable, buttons are tappable, navigation stacks vertically on mobile, images scale appropriately, no horizontal scrolling, text is legible at all breakpoints

Title: Accessibility compliance with screen readers
Preconditions: Landing page loaded, screen reader software active (NVDA/JAWS/VoiceOver)
Steps: 1. Enable screen reader | 2. Navigate landing page using Tab key | 3. Verify skip link appears on focus | 4. Test all interactive elements | 5. Verify ARIA labels are announced | 6. Test FAQ accordion with keyboard
Expected Result: Skip link appears and works, all buttons and links are keyboard accessible, ARIA labels are properly announced, semantic HTML elements are recognized, FAQ accordions can be operated with Enter/Space keys, no focus traps

Title: Landing page performance with slow network connection
Preconditions: Landing page accessible, browser throttled to Slow 3G
Steps: 1. Open browser dev tools | 2. Set network throttling to Slow 3G | 3. Navigate to landing page | 4. Observe loading behavior | 5. Verify loading indicator appears
Expected Result: Loading indicator appears while page is loading, page content loads progressively, no timeout errors, fonts load correctly, FAQ fallback is available if API times out

Title: Login button redirects to authentication page
Preconditions: Landing page loaded
Steps: 1. Locate "Login" button in header | 2. Click the button | 3. Verify redirection
Expected Result: User is redirected to /login.html page for authentication

Title: Footer displays current year dynamically
Preconditions: Landing page loaded
Steps: 1. Scroll to footer | 2. Locate copyright text | 3. Verify year matches current year
Expected Result: Footer displays "© 2026 Oktawave Financial Services. All rights reserved." with correct current year

Title: All footer links are present and correctly labeled
Preconditions: Landing page loaded
Steps: 1. Scroll to footer | 2. Verify all footer sections | 3. Check link text and href attributes
Test Data: Footer sections: Quick Links, Legal, Contact
Expected Result: Footer contains: About Us, Contact, Careers, Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Compliance links; Contact info shows email, phone, and 24/7 support hours

Title: Oktawave branding colors are consistently applied
Preconditions: Landing page loaded, browser dev tools open
Steps: 1. Inspect various elements using dev tools | 2. Verify CSS custom properties | 3. Check computed styles for key elements
Expected Result: Primary color #003366 used for headings and primary buttons, secondary color #0066CC for hover states, accent color #FF6600 for emphasis, background #F5F5F5, text #333333 consistently applied

Title: Smooth scroll animation works for internal links
Preconditions: Landing page loaded, user has not disabled motion preferences
Steps: 1. Click "Learn More" button in CTA section | 2. Observe scroll behavior | 3. Verify smooth animation to features section
Expected Result: Page smoothly scrolls to features section with animation, user preference for reduced motion is respected if set

Title: Page behavior when JavaScript is disabled
Preconditions: Browser with JavaScript disabled, server running
Steps: 1. Disable JavaScript in browser settings | 2. Navigate to http://localhost:9001 | 3. Verify page still displays content
Expected Result: HTML content is visible, CSS styling is applied, page remains readable, FAQs are visible but not interactive, call-to-action links work as standard HTML links

Title: Application button behavior for unauthenticated users
Preconditions: Landing page loaded, user not logged in, no authToken in localStorage
Steps: 1. Clear localStorage | 2. Click "Start Your Application" button | 3. Verify prompt appears | 4. Click Cancel in confirmation dialog
Expected Result: Confirmation dialog appears asking user to register or login, when user clicks Cancel, they remain on landing page, no JavaScript errors

Title: Handling of broken logo or missing icon fonts
Preconditions: Landing page loaded, icon fonts fail to load or images return 404
Steps: 1. Block icon font resources in network tab | 2. Reload page | 3. Verify page still renders correctly
Test Data: Blocked resources: Font files, SVG logos
Expected Result: Page layout remains intact, fallback text or placeholder is shown for logo, feature icons may show as emoji fallbacks, page is still functional and accessible

Title: Cross-browser compatibility testing on older browsers
Preconditions: Landing page accessible, test on IE11 or older Safari versions
Steps: 1. Open landing page in IE11 | 2. Verify layout and functionality | 3. Test on Safari 12 | 4. Check for console errors
Expected Result: Page degrades gracefully on older browsers, core content is accessible, CSS Grid may fallback to alternative layout, ES6 features may not work but page doesn't break, polyfills loaded if configured

Title: Handling of extremely long FAQ answers that exceed viewport
Preconditions: Landing page loaded, FAQ with very long answer text
Steps: 1. Expand FAQ with longest answer | 2. Verify container behavior | 3. Check for overflow issues | 4. Verify scrollability
Expected Result: FAQ answer container expands to show full content, max-height constraint allows scrolling within answer if needed, no layout breaking, content remains readable
